name: mcp-swiss
description: Swiss open data for AI — 68 tools, zero API keys. Transport, weather, geodata, companies, parliament, and 15 more modules.
long_description: mcp-swiss gives any AI assistant direct access to Swiss open data. 68 tools across 20 modules: train schedules (SBB), weather (MeteoSwiss), river levels (BAFU), geodata (swisstopo), company registry (ZEFIX), parliament, avalanche bulletins, holidays, postal services, electricity prices, population statistics, exchange rates (SNB), recycling schedules, news (SRF), voting results, dam registry, hiking trail alerts, real estate data, traffic counts, and earthquake monitoring. All APIs are free and require zero authentication.

tools.name: search_stations
tools.description: Search for Swiss public transport stations/stops by name or coordinates

tools.name: get_connections
tools.description: Get train/bus connections between two Swiss locations

tools.name: get_departures
tools.description: Get live departures from a Swiss transport station

tools.name: get_arrivals
tools.description: Get live arrivals at a Swiss transport station

tools.name: get_nearby_stations
tools.description: Find Swiss public transport stations near given coordinates

tools.name: get_weather
tools.description: Get current weather conditions at a Swiss MeteoSwiss station

tools.name: list_weather_stations
tools.description: List all available MeteoSwiss weather stations in Switzerland

tools.name: get_weather_history
tools.description: Get historical weather data for a Swiss station

tools.name: get_water_level
tools.description: Get current river or lake water level and temperature at a Swiss hydrological station

tools.name: list_hydro_stations
tools.description: List all available BAFU hydrological monitoring stations

tools.name: get_water_history
tools.description: Get historical river/lake water level data for a Swiss hydrological station

tools.name: geocode
tools.description: Convert a Swiss address or place name to coordinates (swisstopo)

tools.name: reverse_geocode

tools.name: search_places
tools.description: Search Swiss place names, localities, mountains, and geographic features

tools.name: get_solar_potential
tools.description: Get rooftop solar energy potential for a location in Switzerland

tools.name: identify_location
tools.description: Identify geographic features and data layers at a specific Swiss location

tools.name: get_municipality

tools.name: search_companies_by_address

tools.name: list_cantons
